architecture_receipt.selection_rule: largest proposal score among events retrieved by completed test-time CEM logs; no frame or timestamp selected manually

aggregate.automatic_raw_event_memory_improves_endp: future-latent MSE relative to no memory; does not imply superiority to recent-only

report.claim_boundary: Breadth results use a clean DINO-feature action-conditioned world model trained on raw OGBench trajectories; they are not official DINO-WM and do not execute planning.

no_manual_cue_contract.event_write_targets: adaptive host-surprise and DINO patch-token change points; future host-loss reduction under group deletion

report.protocol: DINO-feature action-conditioned world model (DINO-WM-style breadth host; not official DINO-WM)
